---
title: CV
---

## Education

__MSc (2026)__
Hunter College, Applied Digital Sociologies  
Independent Project:

__BA (2022)__
University of Denver, Criminology; Minor in Sociolegal Studies and Creative Writing 
Independent Project: 

__AA (2020)__
Ulster County Community College, Humanities & Social Sciences 
Independent Project: 

## Professional Experience

## Presentations
__Charles Greene Day 2026__,
Hunter College

"ICE/CBP Shootings + Detention Center Deaths 2025 – 2026"

__ESS 2026__,
Washington, D.C.

"When the State Shows Up: Police Presence, Use of Force, and the Escalation of Protest Violence"

__ESS 2025__,
Boston, M.A.

"From Virtual Extremism to Real World Aggression: Tracing the
Role of Far-Right Radicalization in Sexual Violence"

## Volunteer Experience

## Additional Qualifications

## Skills
